notes: 6 new nodes (in mint script) + 37 edges. NO jon KILLS styr (Wall/fire trap kills him, not Jon — Lens A+C consensus). NO attacker edge for Ygritte (arrow un-attributed in text — node-prose only). NO Grenn-holds-gate node (HBO-only beat; book tunnel defenders are Noye + 4 unnamed). Existing Noye<->Mag KILLS dyad kept (both directions); reified via the tunnel event node. horn-of-winter already exists (lit its 0-edge node via OWNS). NEW node slugs: death-of-ygritte, noye-and-mag-die-in-the-tunnel, southern-thenn-assault-on-castle-black, jon-takes-command-of-the-wall, jon-sortie-to-mance-camp, bowen-marsh-marches-the-garrison-from-castle-black.

edges.quote: Fifty of them were pounding up the kingsroad in tight column, their shields held up above their heads.
edges.note: the southern Thenn assault is a prong of the Castle Black battle

edges.quote: The Magnar was climbing up the barricade, over the gutted corn sacks and smashed barrels and the bodies of friends and foe alike.
edges.note: Styr the Magnar of Thenn commands the southern infiltration force

edges.quote: the whole lower third of the stair broke off, along with several tons of ice. That was the last that Jon Snow saw of Styr, the Magnar of Thenn.
edges.note: Styr dies in the burning-stair/ice collapse trap (NOT by Jon's hand)

edges.quote: “We kill them,” Jon shouted back, a black arrow in his hand.
edges.note: Jon directs the King's Tower defense against the southern assault

edges.quote: Together they snatched up the thick quilted pads they’d left beside the fire, lifted the heavy kettle of boiling oil, and dumped it down the hole on the Thenns below.
edges.note: Satin pours the boiling oil with Jon

edges.quote: The old wooden steps had drunk up oil like a sponge, and Donal Noye had drenched them from the ninth landing all the way down to the seventh.
edges.note: Noye prepared the oil-and-fire stair trap that destroyed the Thenns

edges.quote: ripped Longclaw from its sheath, and buried the blade in the middle of the first head to pop out of the tower. Bronze was no match for Valyrian steel.
edges.note: Jon kills the first Thenn through the trapdoor with Longclaw

edges.quote: He found Ygritte sprawled across a patch of old snow beneath the Lord Commander’s Tower, with an arrow between her breasts.
edges.note: Ygritte dies during the southern assault

edges.quote: He found Ygritte sprawled across a patch of old snow beneath the Lord Commander’s Tower, with an arrow between her breasts.
edges.note: Ygritte killed by an arrow (shooter un-attributed in text)

edges.quote: When he knelt in the snow beside her, her eyes opened.
edges.note: Jon holds Ygritte as she dies (“You know nothing, Jon Snow”)

edges.quote: Noye’s sword was sunk deep in the giant’s throat, halfway to the hilt.
edges.note: the tunnel mutual-death is a sub-beat of the battle

edges.quote: Noye’s sword was sunk deep in the giant’s throat, halfway to the hilt.
edges.note: Noye kills Mag the Mighty in the gate tunnel

edges.quote: The armorer had always seemed such a big man to Jon, but locked in the giant’s massive arms he looked almost like a child.
edges.note: Noye is killed by Mag in the same exchange (mutual death)

edges.quote: Still the giant found the strength to reach through, twist the head off Spotted Pate, seize the iron gate, and wrench the bars apart.
edges.note: Mag the Mighty kills the tunnel defenders incl. Noye

edges.quote: Noye’s sword was sunk deep in the giant’s throat, halfway to the hilt.
edges.note: Mag is killed by Noye's sword (mutual death)

edges.quote: Lord? I’m a blacksmith. I said, the Wall is yours.
edges.note: the command transfer is a beat of the battle

edges.quote: Lord? I’m a blacksmith. I said, the Wall is yours.
edges.note: Jon receives and holds command of the Wall

edges.quote: Lord? I’m a blacksmith. I said, the Wall is yours.
edges.note: Noye delegates command of the Wall to Jon before descending to the tunnel

edges.quote: It must be you or no one. The Wall is yours, Jon Snow.
edges.note: Aemon confirms Jon as commander after Noye's death

edges.quote: He started walking toward the wildling camp, past the body of a dead giant whose head had been crushed by a stone.
edges.note: Jon's parley/assassination sortie, the night Stannis arrives

edges.quote: Jon swung down onto the ground and rattled Longclaw’s hilt to loosen the bastard blade in its scabbard.
edges.note: Jon goes to Mance's camp armed, intending to kill him

edges.quote: I have decided to give you one last chance to prove you are as loyal as you claim, Lord Snow.
edges.note: Slynt orders the sortie under a parley pretext

edges.quote: “We’re not sending you to talk with Mance Rayder,” Ser Alliser said. “We’re sending you to kill him.”
edges.note: Thorne states the true assassination purpose

edges.quote: I have decided to give you one last chance to prove you are as loyal as you claim, Lord Snow.
edges.note: Slynt coerces Jon into the suicide-mission after Aemon blocks the hanging

edges.quote: rattled Longclaw’s hilt to loosen the bastard blade in its scabbard
edges.note: Jon carries Longclaw into the camp for the kill

edges.quote: The brothers Bowen Marsh had left behind were old men, cripples, and green boys, just as Donal Noye had warned him.
edges.note: Bowen Marsh marched the fighting garrison out, leaving only dregs

edges.quote: We are the garrison, Jon told himself, and look at us. The brothers Bowen Marsh had left behind were old men, cripples, and green boys
edges.note: the weakened garrison is the precondition that makes the assault viable

edges.quote: Feints. Mance wants us to spread ourselves thin, don’t you see?
edges.note: Mance's feint raids bait Bowen into dispersing the garrison

edges.quote: Two hundred men had left Castle Black with Lord Commander Mormont, two hundred of the Watch’s best.
edges.note: the Fist gutted the Watch's field strength (200 -> a dozen), leaving Castle Black undefendable (inferred precondition)

edges.quote: They grow stronger as the days grow shorter and the nights colder. First they kill you, then they send your dead against you.
edges.note: the Others' demonstrated strength (the Fist) is why Mance marches south to break the Wall

edges.quote: Jon lied where he dared and feigned ignorance a few times
edges.note: Jon, the covert Watch loyalist, lies to Styr about Castle Black's defenses during the march south

edges.quote: Did you think only crows could lie? I liked you well enough, for a bastard
edges.note: Mance reveals he lied (via Ygritte) that he never found the Horn of Winter

edges.quote: There are wildlings south of the Wall, coming up from Queenscrown to open the gate.
edges.note: Jon's warning of the southern attack is the intelligence that saves Castle Black

edges.quote: And I can soar above the Wall, and see with eagle eyes.
edges.note: Varamyr scouts Castle Black's defenses from above via the eagle

edges.quote: We know how few you were, when you stopped the turtle. We know how many came from Eastwatch. We know how your supplies have dwindled.
edges.note: Varamyr's aerial recon gives Mance the Watch's true numbers and supplies

edges.quote: The hope was that the Thenns would see them from afar and decide that Castle Black was too well defended to attack.
edges.note: Aemon's scarecrow-sentinel ruse inflates the apparent garrison strength to deter the Thenns

edges.quote: The Horn of Winter, that Joramun once blew to wake giants from the earth.
edges.note: Mance possesses the great warhorn he claims is Joramun's Horn of Winter (provenance theory-gated, asserted in node-prose only); lights the previously 0-edge artifact node
